race.description: Northeast Isuzu Ute Flying Doctor Cup (Bm66) Hcp
race.comment: ZATANNA (7) hit the frame two starts ago at Balaklava but ran below par last time when at Morphettville after being in contention on the corner. Finds a nice race and can turn things around. SHISUTA BO (1) is back after a break of four months. Started the last campaign well when in the placings over 1100m at Bordertown. Yet to win first up but generally runs well with two minor placings from four tries. Looks a winning chance. LADY MEMPHIS (8) improved sharply on her fifth two starts back at Gawler with success over 1100m at Hawker eight days ago, getting home by a big margin. It doesn't get any easier but on her best form she is one of the chief contenders. MCKEEVER (2) was responsible for a better run last start when finishing midfield at headquarters. Finds a nice race and can atone. GWAN SO (5) backs up quickly off a quiet first-up effort in town. Can improve sharply.
